brandBeliefSub: It's a skill waiting to be taught.
brandBeliefBody: Every child is doing their best with the skills they have so far. When feelings run big in the classroom, the answer isn't shame — it's a story, a name for the feeling, and a habit to practice. That is what SELKID builds, one read-aloud at a time.
brandBeliefZh: 对每个孩子来说，情绪困扰不是错误，只是还没学会处理情绪的技能。
description: Story-based SEL, thinking skills, and AI cognition for K–6. Rex & Dino in Maple Forest.
